name: Vietnamese BBQ Duck Breast
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon Dried chile peppers or more
recipeInstructions:
This recipe is equally good with wild duck, partridge, or ptarmigan.
Cut the breasts away from the bird and marinade for at least two days using the other ingredients. The amount of dried chile peppers can be increased up to 2 teaspoons according to taste. After marinating, drain the breasts and grill over charcoal or gas, brushing with additional marinade as needed. Serve with rice.
Recipe by: Jim Weller
